timing_scale.description: Web animation timing. Shorter than Material springs — CSS transition-based, no physics library required.

tokens.use: No animation — reduced-motion users, data-only updates
Small element changes: checkbox tick, switch toggle, icon swap
Component-level: button hover, input focus ring, tooltip appear
Medium UI: dropdown open, popover, toast enter/exit
Large element: sidebar expand, modal enter, page transition

rules: UI animations should almost never exceed 400ms — anything longer feels like lag
Exit animations should be 20–30% faster than enter animations (brain processes exits faster)
Data changes (number count-up, skeleton-to-content) should use 150–200ms max

easing_curves.name: ease-out
easing_curves.use: Elements entering the screen — starts fast, decelerates into place
easing_curves.example: Modal sliding in, dropdown expanding, toast appearing

easing_curves.name: ease-in
easing_curves.use: Elements leaving the screen — starts slow, accelerates away
easing_curves.example: Modal closing, toast disappearing, tooltip hiding

easing_curves.name: ease-in-out
easing_curves.use: Elements moving on screen — smooth deceleration and acceleration
easing_curves.example: Sidebar collapsing/expanding, tab panel switching, carousel slide

easing_curves.name: linear
easing_curves.use: Progress bars, loading spinners, continuous looping animations only
easing_curves.rule: NEVER use linear for UI element entrance/exit — it feels mechanical and cheap

easing_curves.name: spring (optional)
easing_curves.use: Playful overshoot for consumer/marketing UI — FAB appear, success state pop
easing_curves.rule: Use sparingly. Never in enterprise/healthcare/finance products. Only for a single hero moment.

micro_interactions.response: Background lightens or darkens by one step, cursor: pointer
micro_interactions.rule: Never animate button size on hover — it shifts surrounding content

micro_interactions.response: Scale to 0.97–0.98, background darkens (active state color)
micro_interactions.rule: Only scale-down on press, never scale-up — scale-up feels laggy

micro_interactions.response: Border color transitions to --border-focus, ring appears
micro_interactions.rule: NEVER animate the ring opacity on/off with delay — instant ring on focus required for accessibility

micro_interactions.response: Check mark draws in (SVG stroke-dashoffset) or scale from center
micro_interactions.rule: State change must be immediate even if animation plays. Never gate the state on animation completion.

micro_interactions.response: Slide in from bottom-right (or top-center mobile), fade in simultaneously
micro_interactions.rule: Toast position: bottom-right desktop, top-center mobile. Stack multiple toasts vertically with 8px gap.

micro_interactions.response: Panel height animates from 0 to auto (use CSS grid-template-rows: 0fr → 1fr)
micro_interactions.rule: Animate height with grid trick, not max-height — max-height creates visible ease lag. Icon rotates 180deg simultaneously.

micro_interactions.response: Overlay fades in (opacity 0→1, 150ms), panel scales from 0.95→1 and fades (200ms ease-out)
micro_interactions.rule: Panel should feel like it drops into place from slightly above. Don't slide modals — they feel dated.

micro_interactions.response: Cross-fade (skeleton fades out as content fades in)
micro_interactions.rule: Never remove skeleton abruptly. Cross-fade prevents jarring layout shift. Use layout-stable skeleton dimensions.

micro_interactions.response: Error message fades and slides in from slightly above, input border transitions to danger color
micro_interactions.rule: Error state: instant (don't delay the color). Message: can animate. NEVER animate error message out while field is still invalid.

micro_interactions.response: Active indicator slides (translate) to new item position
micro_interactions.rule: Sliding active indicator (like an underline or pill) looks polished. Jumping (instant switch) looks broken.

hover_intent.rule: Don't trigger heavy actions (API calls, panel opens) on immediate hover — add a 100–200ms delay to prevent accidental triggers while the user passes the cursor over
hover_intent.implementation: CSS: transition-delay on show, no delay on hide. JavaScript: setTimeout with clearTimeout on mouseout.
hover_intent.tooltip_delay: 300–500ms show delay, 0ms hide delay — tooltips should disappear immediately on mouseout
hover_intent.dropdown_delay: 0ms show (open immediately on click, not hover). Hover-to-open menus require 200ms intent delay.
hover_intent.hover_card_delay: 400–600ms — long enough to prevent accidental triggers while scanning a list

reduced_motion.rule: All duration values collapse to 0ms or instant in reduced-motion mode. Content changes remain, animations do not.
reduced_motion.implementation: Define all durations as CSS custom properties. Override entire token set in @media block.
reduced_motion.what_to_keep: Opacity transitions ≤100ms (nearly imperceptible). Cross-fades for content swaps.
reduced_motion.what_to_remove: All transforms (translate, scale, rotate), sliding animations, parallax, scroll-triggered animations, looping animations

performance_rules: Only animate properties that don't trigger layout: transform, opacity, filter — NEVER animate width/height/top/left
Use will-change: transform sparingly and only on actively animating elements — it consumes GPU memory
Prefer CSS transitions over JS-driven animations for simple states — CSS is off the main thread
For complex sequences (staggered lists), use Web Animations API or a library like Framer Motion
Test animations at 50% CPU throttle in DevTools — animations that feel fluid at normal speed can stutter on mid-range devices

page_type_motion_guidance.dashboard: Minimal motion. Skeleton→content cross-fades. Metric changes: count-up 300ms. No page-level transitions.
page_type_motion_guidance.landing_page: Scroll-triggered section entrances (fade + translate-y, stagger 50ms between elements). Hero animation 400ms max.
page_type_motion_guidance.form: Focus ring transitions. Error message entrance. Step transitions (wizard): slide left/right 300ms ease-in-out.
page_type_motion_guidance.onboarding: Step changes: gentle slide. Progress bar fill: ease-in-out 300ms. Celebration on completion: scale pop 200ms.
page_type_motion_guidance.settings: Toggle/switch animations only. No page transitions. Save confirmation: toast 200ms.
page_type_motion_guidance.pricing: Plan highlight transitions. Annual/monthly toggle: smooth cross-fade 150ms. No aggressive motion.
page_type_motion_guidance.navigation: Active indicator slide. Mobile drawer: slide in from left 250ms ease-out, overlay fade 200ms.
